zh.lifeSummary: Adeliza Lisle是Humphrey de l'Isle的女兒，於1058年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾卡素 可姆。她於1080年之前與Reginald Robert de Dunstanville在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1130年在英國英格蘭維爾爾享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lisle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

en.lifeSummary: Adeliza Lisle was born in 1058, in Castle Combe, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Humphrey de l'Isle. She married Reginald Robert de Dunstanville before 1080, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1130, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Adeliza Lisle est née en 1058, à Castle Combe, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Humphrey de l'Isle. Elle a épousé Reginald Robert de Dunstanville avant 1080, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1130, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Adeliza Lisle wurde 1058 in Castle Combe, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Humphrey de l'Isle geboren. Sie hat vor 1080 in England Reginald Robert de Dunstanville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1130 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Adeliza Lisle è nata il nel 1058 nel Castle Combe, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Humphrey de l'Isle. Lei sposato Reginald Robert de Dunstanville prima del 1080, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1130, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adeliza Lisleは1058年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアカストル コンベでHumphrey de l'Isleの娘として生まれた。1080年以前にイギリスでReginald Robert de Dunstanvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1130年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeliza Lisle(은)는 1058년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 카스틀 코브에서 Humphrey de l'Isle의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1080년 이전 영국에서 Reginald Robert de Dunstanville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Adeliza Lisle nasceu em 1058, em Castle Combe, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Humphrey de l'Isle. Ela casou-se com Reginald Robert de Dunstanville antes 1080, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1130, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Adeliza Lisle родилась в 1058 г. в местности кастл комб, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Humphrey de l'Isle. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald Robert de Dunstanville перед 1080 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1130 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.
